popularStory.headline: History of David Lindsay (1360-1407)
popularStory.description:
David Lindsay, 1st Earl of Crawford (c. 1360 – 1407) was a Scottish peer who was created Earl in 1398.

Life

Crawford was the son of Sir Alexander Lindsay of Glenesk and Katherine Stirling. Succeedin …

zh.Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭藍納可爾克勞福德
zh.lifeSummary: 當David Lindsay 1st Earl Of Crawford於1359年出生在英國蘇格蘭安格斯時，他的父親Alexander Lindsay - Lord Glenesk30歲，母親Katherine Stirling21歲。他於1374年2月22日與Elizabeth Stewart Princess of Scotland在蘇格蘭艾斯爾凱爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1407年8月12日在蘇格蘭Forfarshire分哈文享年48歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭登迪。

zh-hans.Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland: 英国苏格兰藍納可爾克勞福德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当David Lindsay 1st Earl Of Crawford于1359年出生在英国苏格兰安格斯时，他的父亲Alexander Lindsay - Lord Glenesk30岁，母亲Katherine Stirling21岁。他于1374年2月22日与Elizabeth Stewart Princess of Scotland在苏格兰艾斯爾凱爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1407年8月12日在苏格兰Forfarshire分哈文享年48岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰登迪。

nameMeanings.name: Lindsay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Lindsey in Lincolnshire, England. This is first found in the form Lindissi, apparently a derivative of the British name of Lincoln . To this was later added the Old English element ēg ‘island’, since the place was virtually cut off by the surrounding fenland. The surname was taken to Scotland at an early date and is the name of an important and powerful Scottish family.
Irish: adopted as an equivalent ofvarious Gaelic names (see   Lindsey  ).

variants.name: Linzy
meanings: Altered form of Scottish, Irish, or English   Lindsay   or   Lindsey  . Compare   Lenzy  .

variants.name: Linzey
meanings: English: variant of   Lindsay   or   Lindsey  .

variants.name: Lindsey
meanings: Irish: shortened and Anglicized form of various Gaelic surnames, as for example Ó Loingsigh (see Lynch 1), Mac Giolla Fhionntóg (see McClintock ), and Ó Fhloinn (see Flynn and Lynn ).

variants.name: Lincoln
meanings: English: habitational name from the city of Lincoln, so named from an original British name Lindo- ‘lake’ + Latin colonia ‘settlement, colony’. The place was an important administrative center during the Roman occupation of Britain and in the Middle Ages it was a center for the manufacture of cloth, including the famous ‘Lincoln green’.
African American: adoption of the surname in 1 above, in honor of Abraham Lincoln, the 16th president of the US, who abolished slavery.
History: Abraham Lincoln (1809–65), 16th president of the US, was the son of an illiterate laborer, descended from Samuel Lincoln, who had emigrated from England to MA in 1637.

variants.name: Linsey
meanings: Scottish, Irish, or English: variant of   Lindsay   or   Lindsey  .
Americanized form of German Linse or Swiss German Linsi, see Lins .

nameMeanings.name: David
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the greatest of all the kings of Israel, whose history is recounted with great vividness in the first and second books of Samuel and elsewhere. As a boy he killed the giant Philistine Goliath with his slingshot. As king of Judah, and later of all Israel, he expanded the power of the Israelites and established the security of their kingdom. He was also noted as a poet, many of the Psalms being attributed to him. The Hebrew derivation of the name is uncertain; it is said by some to represent a nursery word meaning ‘darling’. It is a very popular Jewish name, but is almost equally common among Gentiles in the English-speaking world. It is particularly common in Wales and Scotland, having been borne by the patron saint of Wales (  see  Dewi   ) and by two medieval kings of Scotland.

en.lifeSummary: When David Lindsay 1st Earl Of Crawford was born in 1359, in Angus, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Alexander Lindsay - Lord Glenesk, was 30 and his mother, Katherine Stirling, was 21. He married Elizabeth Stewart Princess of Scotland on 22 February 1374, in Kyle, Ayrshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 12 August 1407, in Finhaven, Forfarshire, Scotland, at the age of 48, and was buried in Dundee, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque David Lindsay 1st Earl Of Crawford est né en 1359, à Angus, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Alexander Lindsay - Lord Glenesk, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Katherine Stirling, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Stewart Princess of Scotland le 22 février 1374, à Kyle, Ayrshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 12 août 1407, à Finhaven, Forfarshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterré à Dundee, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als David Lindsay 1st Earl Of Crawford 1359 in Angus, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Alexander Lindsay - Lord Glenesk 30 und seine Mutter Katherine Stirling 21. Er hat am 22. Februar 1374 in Kyle, Ayrshire, Scotland Elizabeth Stewart Princess of Scotland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 12. August 1407 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Finhaven, Forfarshire, Scotland und wurde in Dundee, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando David Lindsay 1st Earl Of Crawford è nato il nel 1359 nel Angus, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Alexander Lindsay - Lord Glenesk, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Katherine Stirling, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Stewart Princess of Scotland il 22 febbraio 1374, nel Kyle, Ayrshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 12 agosto 1407, nel Finhaven, Forfarshire, Scotland, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolto a Dundee, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: David Lindsay 1st Earl Of Crawfordが1359年にイギリススコットランドアンガスで生まれた時，父Alexander Lindsay - Lord Gleneskは30歳，母Katherine Stirlingは21歳であった。1374年2月22日にスコットランドエイルシュアイアクイルでElizabeth Stewart Princess of Scotlandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1407年8月12日にスコットランドForfarshireフィンヘイベンで48歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドダンディーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: David Lindsay 1st Earl Of Crawford(이)가 1359년 영국 스코틀랜드 앤구스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alexander Lindsay - Lord Glenesk(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine Stirling(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1374년 2월 22일 스컷랜드 에이르실르 키일에서 Elizabeth Stewart Princess of Scotland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1407년 8월 12일 스컷랜드 Forfarshire 핑하븐에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 던디에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando David Lindsay 1st Earl Of Crawford nasceu em 1359, em Angus, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Alexander Lindsay - Lord Glenesk, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Stirling, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Stewart Princess of Scotland em 22 de fevereiro de 1374, em Kyle, Ayrshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 12 de agosto de 1407, em Finhaven, Forfarshire, Scotland, com 48 anos, e foi sepultado em Dundee, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда David Lindsay 1st Earl Of Crawford родился в 1359 г. в местности ангус, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Alexander Lindsay - Lord Glenesk было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine Stirling, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Stewart Princess of Scotland 22 февраля 1374 г. в местности кил, аиршир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер 12 августа 1407 г. в местности финавен, Forfarshire, Шотландия в возрасте 48 лет и был похоронен в местности дунди, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando David Lindsay 1st Earl Of Crawford nació en 1359, en Angus, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Alexander Lindsay - Lord Glenesk, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Katherine Stirling, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Stewart Princess of Scotland el 22 de febrero de 1374, en Kyle, Ayrshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 12 de agosto de 1407, en Finhaven, Forfarshire, Scotland, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultado en Dundee, Escocia, Reino Unido.
